# NPC Generation Tables

## Race (d10)

| d10 | Race |
|-----|------|
| 1–2 | Human |
| 3 | Elf |
| 4 | Dwarf |
| 5 | Halfling |
| 6 | Half-Orc |
| 7 | Tiefling |
| 8 | Dragonborn |
| 9 | Gnome |
| 10 | Half-Elf |

## Disposition (d6)

| d6 | Disposition |
|----|-------------|
| 1 | Hostile — wants the party gone or dead |
| 2 | Suspicious — wary, needs convincing |
| 3 | Neutral — indifferent, transactional |
| 4 | Friendly — helpful, chatty |
| 5 | Grateful — owes a debt, eager to help |
| 6 | Mysterious — hidden agenda, cryptic |

## Personality Quirk (d10)

| d10 | Quirk |
|-----|-------|
| 1 | Speaks in the third person |
| 2 | Compulsive liar (but bad at it) |
| 3 | Constantly eating or drinking |
| 4 | Overly formal and polite |
| 5 | Tells long-winded stories |
| 6 | Paranoid — whispers, looks over shoulder |
| 7 | Absurdly cheerful regardless of situation |
| 8 | Has a pet that they talk to constantly |
| 9 | Collects something unusual (teeth, buttons, feathers) |
| 10 | Speaks in proverbs and riddles |

## Secret (d6)

| d6 | Secret |
|----|--------|
| 1 | Has a bounty on their head |
| 2 | Knows the location of a treasure |
| 3 | Is secretly a member of a faction |
| 4 | Is hiding someone or something |
| 5 | Has a magical ability they conceal |
| 6 | No notable secret |
